title: Lucid Group (LCID) Earnings Date and Reports 2026
text: MarketBeat tracks Lucid's earnings calendar and historical earnings reports. The platform shows Q1 2026 earnings reported on May 6, 2026, with significant misses against expectations. Next earnings for Q2 2026 expected in August. Historical calendar shows Lucid reports earnings quarterly following a consistent schedule. Past reports show pattern of guidance reductions and margin deterioration. The earnings history demonstrates escalating losses and persistent inability to reach profitability targets. Investor expectations have moderated considerably from early-stage enthusiasm to realistic acknowledgment that profitability remains years away.
